$comment: Drift detection v2 manifest (ADR-0051 § Drift detection deferred → option 2). Captures the post-migration physical shape of the Knowlex DB so CI can assert that schema.prisma + migrations + actual DB stay in sync. Update this file in the same PR that adds a migration; the verify-schema-shape.mjs script asserts every entry here exists in the migrated DB and fails CI on drift.
